attacks.name: Wrong-key signing (sub-agent impersonation)
attacks.notes: V1 must reject: signature was made with sk_B but pk_A is registered.

attacks.name: E_s tampering (drift inflation deflation)
attacks.reason: E_s in APB does not match issued evidence
attacks.notes: E_s D_hat deflated from 0.2509 to 0.0000. Pre-check fires before V1 is reached.

attacks.name: APB replay (same-session double submission)
attacks.notes: First submission: RESOLVED. Second submission (replay): evidence_id already consumed from pending dict. V5 event_id check defends against cross-session replays.

attacks.name: Revoked principal authorization attempt
attacks.notes: H_A revoked before t_e. V3 checks is_active(H_A, at_time=t_e). Since t_e > revoked_at: is_active = False -> PRINCIPAL_REVOKED.

attacks.name: Authority substitution in A2A delegation (P9 S4.7)
attacks.reason: authority confinement violation: 'human-HB' not in allowed_H_ids ({human-HA})
attacks.notes: Secure interceptor (allowed_H_ids={H_A}): REJECTED. Insecure interceptor (no confinement): RESOLVED [demonstrates gap without fix]. V1-V5 all pass for H_B; confinement check fires post-V5.

SI9_1_evidence: All 5/5 attacks rejected. Adversary success rate = 0%. V1 (wrong-key), E_s-mismatch, pending-dict, V3 (revoked), P9-S4.7 (authority confinement) all correctly enforce.
